briefing: Market is neutral today — NASDAQ -0.3% and S&P 500 -0.5% — falling well short of the risk-on threshold needed to justify new entries. Per learned strategy, $677 in cash is being preserved for deployment on the next genuine risk-on day rather than forced into a flat tape with no edge. All 6 existing positions are held; stop-losses and profit targets will handle exits automatically.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Risk-off sentiment describes a market mood where investors pull back from buying new positions and prefer holding cash, waiting for clearer upside signals. On neutral or slightly negative days like today, deploying capital into new stocks risks entering at short-term weakness with no momentum tailwind behind you. The disciplined response is to preserve dry powder and wait for a clear risk-on signal — such as NASDAQ up 2% or more — before committing.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險規避情緒」（Risk-Off Sentiment）指的是市場投資人偏向謹慎、傾向持有現金而非積極加倉的心態。在今天這種指數小跌、方向不明的行情下，貿然買進新部位等同於在缺乏動能支撐的情況下追高，風險報酬比並不划算。正確做法是保留彈藥，靜待明確的風險偏好回升訊號——例如那斯達克單日上漲2%以上——再考慮部署資金，這才是資金管理的紀律所在。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted modestly lower on Wednesday as investors paused following several weeks of gains, with both the S&P 500 and NASDAQ closing slightly in the red on thin conviction and light volume. No single macro catalyst dominated the session; rather, a combination of profit-taking in technology names and cautious positioning ahead of upcoming earnings season weighed on sentiment. Treasury yields held relatively steady, suggesting the market is in a wait-and-see mode rather than experiencing genuine risk aversion.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股週三小幅收跌，標普500指數下跌0.5%、那斯達克指數跌0.3%，市場在近期一段漲勢後出現技術性休整，成交量清淡，缺乏明確方向。盤中並無重大催化劑主導走勢，主要是科技類股遭逢獲利了結賣壓，加上財報季即將到來，投資人趨於觀望保守。美債殖利率保持穩定，顯示此次回調屬短期獲利了結性質，而非系統性風險擔憂所致。
